bakery_products_names_types.label: Names and Types of Bakery Products
bakery_products_names_types.help: List the names and types of bread and bakery items produced (e.g., Sourdough Whole Wheat Bread, Rye Bread).

flours_used_types.label: Types of Flours Used
flours_used_types.help: Specify the types of flours used (e.g., Type 1 wheat flour, ancient grains, stone-ground spelt).

flours_origin_own_or_third_party_locatio.label: Origin and Sourcing of Flours
flours_origin_own_or_third_party_locatio.help: Indicate if the flour comes from your own grain crops or specify the name and location of the mill/third-party farm.

flours_characteristics_agronomical_featu.label: Agronomical Characteristics of Flours
flours_characteristics_agronomical_featu.help: Describe the agronomical features (e.g., certified organic grain, biodynamic methods, heritage open-pollinated seed varieties).

other_ingredients_names_origin.label: Other Ingredients and Origin
other_ingredients_names_origin.help: List any other ingredients used (oil, salt, seeds, dried fruits) and their geographical or ethical origin.

raw_materials_storage_locations.label: Raw Materials Storage Locations
raw_materials_storage_locations.help: Specify where grains and flours are stored to ensure environmental and temperature controls.

water_supply_source.label: Water Supply Source
water_supply_source.help: Identify the source of the water used in dough preparation (e.g., public municipal aqueduct, private controlled well).

water_quality_control_monitoring.label: Water Quality Control Monitoring
water_quality_control_monitoring.help: Detail filtering systems or dates of periodic microbiological analysis conducted on the water supply.

yeasts_used_types.label: Types of Yeasts or Leavening Used
yeasts_used_types.help: Specify the leavening method (e.g., solid sourdough starter, liquid sourdough/li.co.li, organic brewer's yeast).

additives_usage_log.label: Additives Usage Log
additives_usage_log.help: Declare any acidity regulators, flour treatment agents, or enzymes added during production. Leave blank if none.

preservatives_usage_log.label: Preservatives Usage Log
preservatives_usage_log.help: Log any anti-mold or chemical preservatives used to extend shelf-life. Leave blank if none.

flavorings_usage_log.label: Flavorings Usage Log
flavorings_usage_log.help: Specify if natural or synthetic aroma chemical flavorings are inserted into the dough. Leave blank if none.

processing_and_transformation_methodolog.label: Processing and Transformation Methodology
processing_and_transformation_methodolog.help: Describe the kneading, rising times (hours and temperatures), and general artisan manufacturing process.

baking_oven_type_and_fuel.label: Baking Oven Type and Fuel Sourcing
baking_oven_type_and_fuel.help: Specify the technology and fuel used for baking (e.g., direct wood-fired oven with certified local timber, electric deck oven).

packaging_types_materials.label: Packaging Types and Materials
packaging_types_materials.help: Describe the wrapping format (e.g., unbleached recycled paper bags, PLA compostable bags, unpackaged/bulk).

organoleptic_description_free_text.label: Organoleptic Qualitative Description
organoleptic_description_free_text.help: Provide notes about crust crispness, crumb structure, aroma profile, and typical optimal pairing suggestions.

source_price_per_kg_including_vat.label: Source Price Breakdown per KG (Including VAT)
source_price_per_kg_including_vat.help: Detail the final transparent cost per KG to consumers, clarifying the raw material cost shares vs baking labor margins.

additional_considerations_notes.label: Additional Considerations and Notes
additional_considerations_notes.help: Any miscellaneous specifications or solidarity logistics considerations regarding bakery order clearing.
